entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A company, institution, or other organized body.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A tangible good or service produced and marketed.

entity_types.name: LegalCase
entity_types.description: A dispute between opposing parties that may be resolved by a court or other legal process.
examples: motion in the Federal District Court

entity_types.name: Division
entity_types.description: A distinct unit or department within a larger organization.

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: A significant occurrence or happening, often with a specific date or impact.

relation_groups.name: Organizational Structure
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the internal structure and personnel of organizations.

relations.name: headquartered_in
relations.detail: An organization's primary administrative location.

relations.name: founded_by
relations.detail: A person who established an organization.

relations.name: founded_in
relations.detail: The location where an organization was founded.

relations.name: has_ceo
relations.detail: A person who holds the chief executive officer position in an organization.

relations.name: has_division
relations.detail: An organization that contains a specific division.

relations.name: resigned_from
relations.detail: A person who left their position at an organization.

relation_groups.name: Corporate Transactions
relation_groups.description: Relations describing business activities such as acquisitions, partnerships, and investments.

relations.name: acquired
relations.detail: An organization that purchased another organization.

relations.name: partnered_with
relations.detail: An organization that formed a partnership with another organization.

relations.name: invested_in
relations.detail: An organization that made an investment in another organization.

relation_groups.name: Product & Technology
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the development, release, and evolution of products and technologies.

relations.name: develops
relations.detail: An organization that created or developed a product.

relations.name: released
relations.detail: An organization that launched a product to the market.

relations.name: markets
relations.detail: An organization that sells or promotes a product.

relations.name: provides
relations.detail: An organization that offers a product or service.

relations.name: is_version_of
relations.description: Indicates that one operating system is a version or iteration of another.
relations.detail: A version of the operating system

relations.name: runs_on
relations.description: Indicates that a product operates or is designed to function on a specific operating system.
relations.detail: runs on

relation_groups.name: Legal and Regulatory
relation_groups.description: Relations describing legal actions, criticisms, and compliance issues involving organizations.

relations.name: faced_legal_action_from
relations.detail: An organization that was subject to legal action initiated by another organization.

relations.name: violated
relations.detail: An organization that was found to have violated an agreement or ruling related to a legal case.

relation_groups.name: Events and Milestones
relation_groups.description: Relations describing significant events and milestones in an organization's history.

relations.name: changed_focus_towards
relations.detail: An organization that shifted its primary business focus towards a particular product or technology.

relations.name: resulted_in
relations.description: An event that led to a specific legal case or outcome.
relations.detail: resulting in

relations.name: occurred_in
relations.description: The location where a significant event took place.
relations.detail: in
